title: eriastrum diffusum subsp. utahense
intro: Eriastrum diffusum subsp. utahense, also known as the Utah yarrow or yarrow, is a perennial herb that belongs to the family Polemoniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Eriastrum diffusum subsp. utahense can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and respiratory problems.
